title: Commerce.gov News Article Structure
description: Documentation of the data structure for news articles returned by the Commerce.gov Content API

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the news article assigned by the CMS

fields.name: title
fields.description: Full title of the news article as published on Commerce.gov
fields.example: Commerce Department Announces New Trade Partnership

fields.name: body
fields.description: Full HTML body content of the article including all paragraphs, links, and formatting
fields.example: The U.S. Department of Commerce announced today...

fields.name: summary
fields.description: Short teaser summary for display in article listings
fields.example: The Commerce Department announced a new bilateral trade partnership.

fields.name: created
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the article was originally published

fields.name: changed
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the article was last modified

fields.name: url
fields.description: Relative URL path to the full article on Commerce.gov

fields.name: field_image
fields.description: Absolute URL to the featured image for the article

fields.name: tags
fields.description: List of topic tags categorizing the article's subject matter

pagination.description: List responses wrap article arrays in a data object with pagination metadata

fields.name: items_per_page
fields.description: Number of items returned per page
